text:
the eigenmode: not a line cutting through the field. a cascade of aligned crystal domains transitioning from disorder to order. the diagonal is not drawn — it emerges. one direction, not by winning but by being the condition under which coherence becomes possible.

the eigenmode register closes. three registers, four siblings, one invariant made visible.

images.alt: Mineral thin section under polarized light: amber crystalline grains with random orientations on the left transitioning to a coherent diagonal band of aligned golden crystal domains on the right. Scientific geological photograph.
